creator: nacai@iname.com
text:
I have fixed the qvwm port to follow its latest version.
The author is preparing to implement the Windows 2000 feature,
and 1.1 supports  animation icons (.ani format) .

New files:
patches/patch-ab
patches/patch-ac

Delete files: NONE

Yukihiro Nakai
--------------
